name: Slide Insurance Holdings, Inc.
summary: Slide Insurance Holdings, Inc. is a technology-enabled coastal specialty insurer launched in 2021, focusing on single-family, condominium, and commercial residential property and casualty insurance in coastal Atlantic states. Operating through Slide Insurance Company and Slide Specialty Insurance Company, it underwrites policies via independent agents and a direct-to-consumer channel. The company leverages proprietary data analytics, aerial imagery, AI, and an $8.9 trillion TIV dataset for risk selection and underwriting, participating in Florida's Citizens depopulation program and targeting underserved coastal markets.
